getPrice().details: Must return zero only on failure — callers revert on zero.

hasEnoughHistory().details: Used as a pre-flight check at deploy time and in monitoring scripts.

getPrice().notice: Returns the current price as quoteToken amount per base unit.

hasEnoughHistory().notice: Returns true when the oracle has sufficient history to produce a reliable price.
